title: linochilus jenesanus
intro: Linochilus jenesanus is a plant species that belongs to the family Ebenaceae, native to the tropical forests of Madagascar. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antimalarial and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory infections. In traditional medicine, Linochilus jenesanus is prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water, or it is used in the form of a decoction or tincture.
